title: 10 best herbal capsules for oily skin

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lemon balm capsules helps with oily skin because they contain rosmarinic acid, a compound that has been shown to reduce sebum production and inflammation in the skin. This natural ingredient also possesses antibacterial properties, which help to control the growth of acne-causing bacteria. Additionally, lemon balm's calming effects can soothe redness and irritation, leaving the skin looking clearer and more balanced. By reducing excess oil production and combating acne, herbal lemon balm capsules provide a holistic approach to managing oily skin.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Lemon balm's antioxidants help neutralize free radicals that can cause skin inflammation, reducing the appearance of pores and preventing clogged pores associated with oily skin.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Lemon balm's anti-inflammatory compounds reduce redness and swelling associated with acne, rosacea, and other inflammatory skin conditions caused by excessive oil production.

Astringent and antibacterial properties: Lemon balm's astringent and antibacterial compounds help tighten pores, reducing the appearance of blackheads and whiteheads, while also inhibiting the growth of bacteria that can cause breakouts and clogged pores.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which help reduce sebum production and soothe inflammation associated with oily skin.
Seeds: Containing omega-3 fatty acids and antioxidants, seeds can help regulate skin's natural oil balance and combat acne-causing bacteria.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh melissa officinalis leaves in the morning after dew has dried to ensure maximum potency.
Dry the harvested leaves using a dehydrator or air circulation on low heat for 2-3 hours.
Crush the dried lemon balm leaves into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle or coffee grinder.
Mix the powdered lemon balm with 200mg of gelatin capsules in a small bowl and fill each capsule individually.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Aloe capsules helps with oily skin because they contain aloe vera extract that has natural anti-inflammatory properties. These capsules can help to reduce excess sebum production, which is a common cause of oily skin. Additionally, aloe vera has antibacterial and antifungal properties that can help to prevent acne and other skin impurities from forming. By taking aloe capsules regularly, individuals with oily skin may experience improved skin texture and reduced appearance of pores, leading to healthier and more balanced-looking skin.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Aloe vera's anti-inflammatory properties help reduce redness and swelling associated with oily skin, making it an effective remedy for acne and other inflammatory skin conditions.

Antioxidant: Aloe vera's antioxidant properties help neutralize free radicals that can cause oxidative stress and damage to the skin, leading to an imbalance of oil production and resulting in oily skin.
Astringent: Aloe vera's astringent properties help tighten pores and reduce sebum production, which can help control excess oiliness and leave skin feeling clean and refreshed.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Rich in antioxidants and vitamins, aloe vera leaves help to soothe and calm oily skin, reducing inflammation and redness.
Roots: Containing anti-inflammatory compounds, aloe vera roots aid in reducing acne and hyperpigmentation associated with oily skin.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh aloe vera leaves from a healthy plant and cut them into small pieces.
Weigh out 100g of the aloe vera pulp and grind it into a fine powder using a coffee grinder.
Mix the powdered aloe vera with 200mg of dried chamomile flowers and 50mg of tea tree essential oil in a bowl.
Add 10ml of glycerin and 10ml of distilled water to the mixture and stir until a smooth paste forms.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the herbal mixture and store them in an airtight container for up to 2 years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maidenhair tree capsules helps with oily skin because they are rich in antioxidants and fatty acids that help to regulate sebum production. The capsules contain a compound called saponin, which has been shown to reduce inflammation and prevent pores from becoming clogged. Additionally, the capsules have natural astringent properties that can help to tighten pores and reduce the appearance of oily skin. As a result, maidenhair tree capsules can provide effective relief for individuals with acne-prone or oily skin.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Maidenhair tree capsules contain antioxidants that help neutralize free radicals, which can contribute to oxidative stress and inflammation that exacerbate oily skin.
Anti-inflammatory properties: The capsules' anti-inflammatory compounds may help reduce redness and irritation associated with oily skin, promoting a more balanced and healthy complexion.

Antibacterial properties: Maidenhair tree's antibacterial properties can help control the growth of Propionibacterium acnes (P. acnes), a type of bacteria that can clog pores and contribute to acne, a common issue associated with oily skin.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the maidenhair tree contain compounds that help regulate sebum production, making them effective in reducing excess oiliness on the skin.
Barks: The barks of the maidenhair tree have anti-inflammatory properties that can help soothe and calm irritated skin caused by oily conditions.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh ginkgo biloba leaves in the fall season weighing approximately 500 grams.
Clean and wash the harvested leaves thoroughly under cold running water.
Dry the cleaned leaves in a food dehydrator set at 60 degrees celsius for 24 hours or until crispy.
Grind the dried leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder then mix with silica gel as filler at a ratio of 10:1.
Fill empty capsules with 250 milligrams of the ginkgo biloba powder and store in an airtight container for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Pot marigold capsules helps with oily skin because they are rich in antioxidants and flavonoids that reduce inflammation and free radical damage. The capsules also contain carotenoids, which help to regulate sebum production and balance the skin's natural oil levels. Additionally, the anti-inflammatory properties of pot marigold capsules can help to soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and acne associated with oily skin conditions. Overall, regular use of pot marigold capsules can lead to a more balanced and healthier complexion.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Calendula's antioxidants help to neutralize free radicals, which can damage skin cells and lead to inflammation and oil production, making it an effective natural remedy for oily skin.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Calendula's anti-inflammatory compounds reduce redness and swelling associated with acne and other skin conditions caused by excess oil, helping to calm and soothe the skin.

Antimicrobial properties: Calendula's antimicrobial agents help to inhibit the growth of bacteria and other microorganisms that can clog pores and exacerbate oily skin, reducing the risk of infection and promoting healthy skin.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, roots help to reduce inflammation and soothe irritated skin.
Seeds: Packed with fatty acids, seeds help to balance the skin's natural oil production and regulate sebum secretion.
remedy_recipe: Harvest calendula officinalis flowers at peak bloom and dry them thoroughly in a warm air circulation oven or dehydrator within 24 hours of picking.
Grind dried calendula officinalis flowers into a fine powder using an electric spice grinder or mortar and pestle to ensure uniform particles.
Mix one part ground calendula officinalis with two parts gelatin and add distilled water in a 1:1 ratio to form a paste, allowing it to infuse for at least 30 minutes.
Fill empty vegetarian capsules with the infused paste using a capsule filler machine or fill by hand, ensuring each capsule contains approximately 500 milligrams of calendula officinalis mixture.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container away from direct sunlight and moisture, allowing them to mature for at least two weeks before consumption.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Kansas coneflower capsules helps with oily skin because of its natural anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The active compound, echinacea, reduces redness and swelling, while also combating Pseudomonas aeruginosa bacteria that can cause breakouts. Additionally, the capsules' antioxidants help regulate sebum production, reducing excess oil secretion and promoting a balanced skin pH. This holistic approach addresses the root causes of oily skin, leading to clearer, healthier-looking complexion.
remedy_properties: Inflammation reduction: Kansas coneflower capsules contain compounds like kaempferol and quercetin, which have anti-inflammatory effects that can help reduce redness and irritation associated with oily skin.

Antimicrobial activity: The herb contains triterpenoid saponins, which exhibit antimicrobial properties that can help combat acne-causing bacteria, reducing the occurrence of breakouts and preventing pores from becoming clogged.

Antioxidant activity: Kansas coneflower is rich in antioxidants like flavonoids and phenolic acids, which can help neutralize free radicals and protect the skin from environmental stressors, leading to a reduction in oxidative stress that can contribute to oily skin.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the Kansas coneflower plant contain saponins, which are known for their ability to reduce sebum production and inflammation in the skin, making them beneficial for treating oily skin.
Rhizomes: Rhizomes of the Kansas coneflower plant have anti-inflammatory properties that can help soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing redness and discomfort associated with oily skin.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried echinacea angustifolia roots and cut them into small pieces.
Soak the chopped roots in vodka or grain alcohol for 2 weeks at room temperature.
Strain the liquid mixture through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh sieve into a clean glass container.
Fill gelatin capsules with 300-400mg of the concentrated root extract and store them in an airtight container.
Take two to three capsules daily with water for at least six weeks to help reduce oily skin.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Wild geranium capsules helps with oily skin because they contain saponins, which have a drying effect on the skin, reducing excess oil production. Additionally, the capsules' anti-inflammatory properties help to soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and irritation often associated with acne-prone skin. As a result, herbal wild geranium capsules can help to balance and regulate the skin's natural moisture levels, leading to a smoother, clearer complexion.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Wild Geranium's antioxidant properties help to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the skin, which can contribute to oil production and clogged pores.

Anti-Inflammatory Properties: The herb's anti-inflammatory properties help to reduce redness, swelling, and irritation associated with oily skin, while also regulating sebum production to prevent excessive oiliness.

Astringent Properties: Wild Geranium's astringent properties help to tighten pores, reducing their appearance and minimizing the appearance of blackheads and whiteheads, making it an effective remedy for oily skin prone to acne.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, which help to soothe and calm oily skin.
Barks: Containing salicylic acid and other beta hydroxy acids, these help to exfoliate and unclog pores, reducing oiliness.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh wild geranium leaves and flowers measuring exactly 30 grams of dried plant material.
Mix the dried wild geranium with 100 grams of organic cornstarch in a glass bowl ensuring thorough combination.
Add 10 milliliters of glycerin and 20 milliliters of distilled water slowly stirring to form a paste within 5 minutes.
Fill empty #0 capsules with 250 milligrams of the herbal paste using a capsule filling machine processing for 2 hours.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 12 months or frozen for longer.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Milk thistle capsules helps with oily skin because they contain silymarin, a powerful antioxidant that reduces inflammation and soothes the skin. The capsules also help to detoxify the liver, which in turn helps to regulate sebum production and balance the skin's natural oil levels. This results in a reduction of excess oil and shine, leaving the skin looking clearer and more balanced. Additionally, milk thistle's anti-inflammatory properties help to calm redness and irritation, further promoting healthy and radiant-looking skin.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Milk thistle's antioxidant properties help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation, which can contribute to oily skin by reducing redness and irritation.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Milk thistle's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as silymarin, may help reduce inflammation in the skin, which can lead to clogged pores and excess oil production, alleviating symptoms of oily skin.

Antibacterial properties: Milk thistle's antibacterial properties may help combat bacterial overgrowth on the skin, which can contribute to oily skin by reducing sebum production and preventing further breakout.
remedy_parts: Seeds: Rich in silymarin, a bioflavonoid that helps to reduce inflammation and calm acne-prone skin.
Flowers: Containing flavonoids like kaempferol, which possess antioxidant properties that can help soothe and regulate oily skin.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality silybum marianum seeds and clean them thoroughly of any debris or impurities.
Grind the cleaned seeds into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for about 10 minutes.
Combine 500 milligrams of the ground milk thistle seed powder with 500 milliliters of distilled water to create an infusion mixture and stir well.
Steep the infusion mixture in a saucepan over low heat for 30 minutes or until it reaches a comfortable drinking temperature.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the infused mixture and seal tightly.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dandelion capsules helps with oily skin because they contain natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties that help to reduce excessive sebum production. The bioactive compounds in dandelion root, such as taraxasterol and taraxylon, have been shown to regulate the skin's oil glands, leading to a decrease in pores' ability to produce excess oil. Additionally, dandelion capsules may also help to balance the skin's pH levels, reducing irritation and redness associated with oily skin.
remedy_properties: Diuretic properties: Dandelion capsules can help reduce water retention and excess sebum production, which can contribute to oily skin by increasing urine output and flushing out toxins.
Antioxidant properties: Dandelion's antioxidants can neutralize free radicals that damage the skin and lead to inflammation, making it a great natural remedy for calming and soothing oily skin.
Cholagogue properties: Dandelion stimulates bile production in the liver, which can help reduce cholesterol levels and prevent clogged pores, both of which can contribute to oily skin.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that help to soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing redness and inflammation associated with oily skin.
Fruits: Containing high levels of vitamin A, which helps to regulate sebum production and reduce acne, while also providing antioxidant benefits for the skin.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality taraxacum officinale roots and leaves for maximum efficacy.
Cleanse the harvested plant material by rinsing with distilled water and air-drying for 24 hours.
Comminute the dried plant material into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle, taking approximately 10 minutes.
Mix one part powdered dandelion root and leaves with three parts gelatin capsules, filling each capsule by hand, and seal immediately, taking about 15 minutes per batch of 100 capsules.
Store the filled herbal capsules in an airtight container away from direct sunlight and moisture for up to six months, ensuring optimal potency and freshness.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Marshmallow capsules helps with oily skin because they contain mucilage, a soothing substance that absorbs excess oil and purifies the pores. The antioxidant properties of marshmallow also help to reduce inflammation and prevent acne breakouts. Additionally, marshmallow's natural astringent properties help to tighten the pores, reducing their appearance and leaving the skin feeling smooth and refined. By regulating sebum production and minimizing inflammation, marshmallow capsules can bring balance to oily skin, resulting in a clearer, healthier complexion.
remedy_properties: Demulcent property: Marshmallow root has a soothing, protective barrier that can calm and moisturize the skin, reducing inflammation and redness associated with oily skin conditions like acne.

Anti-inflammatory property: Marshmallow root contains compounds that have anti-inflammatory effects, which can help reduce swelling and irritation caused by excessive oil production and clogged pores in oily skin.

Antioxidant property: Marshmallow root is rich in antioxidants that can neutralize free radicals, protecting the skin from environmental stressors and oxidative damage that can contribute to oily skin and acne.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in mucilage, a thick, protective substance that helps soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing inflammation associated with oily skin.
Rhyzomes: Contain anti-inflammatory compounds that help reduce redness and swelling caused by clogged pores and excess oil production.
remedy_recipe: Dry 250 grams of althaea officinalis leaves in a dehydrator at 60°c for 2 hours to preserve potency.
Combine 150 grams of dried leaves with 300 milliliters of boiling water in a heat-resistant glass container.
Steep the mixture for 20 minutes, then strain it through a cheesecloth into another container discarding solids and seeds.
Mix 50 grams of glycerin with 100 milliliters of the herbal liquid to create an extract solution, stir until dissolved.
Fill gelatin capsules with 500 milligrams each of the herbal extract solution and store them in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Stinging nettle capsules helps with oily skin because they contain beta-carotene, an antioxidant that helps to regulate sebum production. This means that the body produces less oil, resulting in a reduction of shine and a more balanced complexion. Additionally, stinging nettle has natural anti-inflammatory properties that help to soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and irritation often associated with oily skin. Regular consumption of these capsules can lead to a smoother, more even-toned complexion.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Stinging nettle capsules have anti-inflammatory compounds that reduce redness, swelling, and irritation associated with acne and oily skin.
Antioxidant properties: Nettle capsules contain antioxidants that combat free radicals, which can cause oxidative stress and contribute to oil production and clogged pores in oily skin.

Antibacterial and antifungal properties: Stinging nettle's antibacterial and antifungal compounds help prevent bacterial and fungal growth on the skin, reducing the risk of breakouts and infections that can exacerbate oily skin.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, nettle roots help to reduce inflammation and soothe skin irritation associated with oily skin.
Seeds: Containing omega-3 fatty acids and other essential nutrients, nettle seeds support the skin's natural barrier function and help regulate oil production.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh nettle leaves in the morning after dew has dried and wash them gently with lukewarm water.
Dry the washed nettle leaves using a food dehydrator at 105°f for 6 hours or air drying for 24 hours.
Crush the dried nettle leaves into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle to release bioactive compounds.
Mix the powdered nettle with 200mg of gelatin capsules and fill them by hand in small batches taking approximately 30 minutes per batch.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 12 months or refrigerate for longer shelf life.

intro_desc: Herbal capsules for oily skin are natural supplements designed to help regulate and balance sebum production, reducing the appearance of oily skin. The best herbal capsules for oily skin include Silybum marianum, Curcuma longa, Aloe vera, Glycyrrhiza glabra, Melaleuca alternifolia, Aloe barbadensis, Azadirachta indica, Ginkgo biloba, Zingiber officinale, and Eucalyptus globulus. If left untreated, oily skin can lead to acne, premature aging, and low self-esteem, negatively impacting daily life, social interactions, and overall well-being.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat oily skin with herbal capsules is to opt for formulations rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory agents. Capsules containing burdock root, neem, and turmeric have been found to effectively reduce sebum production and purify the skin. Take two capsules twice a day after meals and drink plenty of water to help flush out toxins from the body, resulting in clearer and more balanced skin.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to oily skin that are treated with herbal capsules are acne, rosacea, and eczema. These conditions often exhibit symptoms like inflammation, redness, and excessive sebum production, making herbal remedies a popular choice for their management. Capsules containing herbs like tea tree oil, chamomile, and turmeric have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help soothe and calm the skin, reducing symptoms of these conditions.

remedies.remedy_desc: Silybum marianum capsules helps with oily skin because they contain silymarin, a compound that has been shown to reduce inflammation and promote liver health. A healthy liver is essential for detoxifying the body and regulating oil production in the skin. By supporting liver function, Silybum marianum capsules can help to reduce the amount of oil produced by the skin, leading to a more balanced and healthy complexion. This can result in a reduction in acne and other oily skin issues.
remedy_constituents: Silymarin: Silymarin helps with oily skin by acting as an antioxidant and anti-inflammatory agent, reducing the production of sebum and preventing the damage caused by free radicals.

Flavonoids: Flavonoids in Silybum marianum help with oily skin by inhibiting the activity of 5-alpha-reductase, an enzyme that converts testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a hormone that contributes to increased sebum production.
Lignans: Lignans in Silybum marianum help with oily skin by exhibiting anti-androgenic properties, which can help reduce sebum production and alleviate acne symptoms.
remedy_parts: Seeds: They are used due to their silymarin content, which has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help regulate oil production in the skin.
Leaves: They are used because of their flavonoid and polyphenol content, which helps to reduce sebum production and prevent clogged pores.
Seeds: They are also used due to their ability to reduce inflammation and improve skin elasticity, making them beneficial for oily skin conditions.
remedy_recipe: Harvest silybum marianum flowers and leaves from a clean and dry environment for future use.
Dry the harvested silybum marianum in a low-temperature oven at 150°f for 2 hours.
Grind the dried silybum marianum into a fine powder using a coffee grinder for 30 seconds.
Mix 500mg of the ground silybum marianum with 500mg of vegetable cellulose powder for 5 minutes.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the silybum marianum mixture and seal them immediately using a capsule machine.

remedies.remedy_desc: Curcuma longa capsules helps with oily skin because of its natural anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The active compound curcumin in these capsules reduces inflammation and prevents the production of sebum, a key contributor to oily skin. By regulating sebum production and reducing inflammation, Curcuma longa capsules promote a balanced skin pH and minimize the appearance of pores, resulting in a clearer and healthier complexion. This natural remedy also helps to soothe and calm irritated skin, leaving it feeling smooth and refreshed.
remedy_constituents: Curcuminoids: These compounds help reduce inflammation and prevent the overproduction of sebum, thereby controlling oily skin.
Ferulic acid: This phenolic compound has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties that help to regulate sebum production and prevent clogged pores, resulting in a reduction of oily skin.
Demethoxycurcumin (DMC): This compound has been shown to inhibit the activity of certain enzymes involved in sebum production, thereby helping to regulate oily skin and prevent acne.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Curcuma longa's underground stems are used to make capsules for oily skin because they contain a high concentration of curcumin, a natural anti-inflammatory that helps reduce skin inflammation and acne.

Roots: The underground storage organs of Curcuma longa are used to make capsules for oily skin because they contain a combination of antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that help soothe and calm the skin.

Seeds: The reproductive structures of Curcuma longa are used to make capsules for oily skin because they contain a high amount of essential fatty acids and anti-inflammatory compounds that help to balance and regulate skin oil production.
remedy_recipe: Weigh 250 grams of dried curcuma longa root powder using a precise electronic balance scale.
Mix 250 grams of the powder with 500 grams of gelatin powder in a large bowl.
Add 100 grams of glycerin and 200 grams of distilled water to the mixture in the bowl.
Heat the mixture in a double boiler for 30 minutes or until the gelatin dissolves completely.
Fill 100 empty gelatin capsules with the mixture and store them in an airtight container.

remedies.remedy_desc: Aloe vera capsules helps with oily skin because they contain a powerful blend of vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants that help to regulate oil production and balance the skin's natural pH. The capsules also contain anti-inflammatory properties that reduce redness and irritation, while its astringent properties help to tighten pores and reduce shine. Additionally, aloe vera helps to soothe and calm the skin, reducing the appearance of pores and giving the skin a smoother, more even tone. This results in a more balanced and healthy-looking complexion.
remedy_constituents: Anthraquinones: These compounds help reduce sebum production, thereby controlling oily skin.
Fatty acids: The presence of fatty acids, particularly linoleic acid, helps to regulate the skin's natural moisture barrier, reducing oiliness and acne.
Glycoproteins: These proteins help to regulate the skin's natural pH balance, reducing inflammation and excess oil production associated with oily skin.
remedy_parts: Leaves: They are used due to their high content of aloe-emodin, a compound that helps to reduce oil production and inflammation in the skin.
Gel from Leaves: The gel obtained from the leaves is used for its soothing and calming properties, which help to reduce acne and other skin issues associated with oily skin.
Aloe Polysaccharides from Leaves: These polysaccharides are used for their ability to regulate the skin's moisture balance, reducing oil production and preventing clogged pores.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100 to 150 fresh aloe vera leaves of 10 cm in length and cut them into small pieces.
Dry the aloe vera pieces in a low-temperature oven at 50°c for 6 hours or using a food dehydrator.
Grind the dried aloe vera pieces into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or food processor.
Fill 100 empty gelatin capsules with 500 mg of the aloe vera powder each using a capsule filler.
Store the herbal aloe vera capsules in a cool dry place for up to 2 years.

remedies.remedy_desc: Glycyrrhiza glabra capsules helps with oily skin because they contain licorice root extract, which has anti-inflammatory properties that soothe and calm the skin. The extract also possesses astringent properties that help to regulate oil production, reducing the appearance of pores and minimizing sebum buildup. Additionally, Glycyrrhiza glabra has been shown to improve skin elasticity and reduce redness, resulting in a more balanced and healthy complexion. As a result, it is often used in skincare products to help manage oily skin and promote overall skin health.
remedy_constituents: Saponins: These compounds help to reduce sebum production and have an astringent effect on the skin, thus controlling oiliness.

Flavonoids (specifically, liquiritin and isoliquiritin): These compounds have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe and calm the skin, reducing the appearance of oily skin.
Trigonelline: This alkaloid has astringent properties that can help to tighten the skin's pores, reducing oil secretion and thus controlling oily skin.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of Glycyrrhiza glabra are used due to their high content of glycyrrhizin, which has anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe and control oily skin.

Leaves: The leaves of Glycyrrhiza glabra are used because they contain flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties that help to reduce oil production and prevent acne.

Seeds: The seeds of Glycyrrhiza glabra are used due to their rich content of triterpenoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties that help to control oil production and prevent bacterial growth on the skin.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 50g of dried glycyrrhiza glabra roots from a trusted supplier or cultivate them in your garden.
Dry the harvested roots in a low-temperature oven at 50°c for 2 hours to remove excess moisture.
Grind 20g of the dried roots into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered roots with 5g of starch as a filler and 2g of gelatin as a binder.
Fill each gelatin capsule with 200mg of the powder mixture and seal them tightly.

remedies.remedy_desc: Melaleuca alternifolia capsules helps with oily skin because of their natural astringent and antibacterial properties. The capsules contain tea tree oil, which has been shown to reduce sebum production, balancing the skin's natural oil levels. Tea tree oil also possesses antifungal and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to control acne and soothe irritated skin. Regular use of these capsules can lead to a more even skin tone and a reduction in oiliness, leaving the skin feeling clean and refreshed. This makes them an effective natural remedy for oily skin.
remedy_constituents: Cineole (Eucalyptol): Cineole helps reduce the production of sebum, a natural oil produced by the skin that can contribute to oily skin.
Terpinen-4-ol: Terpinen-4-ol has antibacterial properties that can help control the growth of bacteria on the skin, reducing the risk of clogged pores and acne that can be associated with oily skin.
Linalool: Linalool has anti-inflammatory properties that can help soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and irritation that can be associated with oily skin.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Rich in active compounds that help reduce oil production and inflammation in the skin.
Leaves: Also contain antioxidants that help protect the skin from environmental stressors and promote a healthy complexion.
Barks: Contain anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that help soothe and balance oily skin.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 20-30 grams of dried melaleuca alternifolia leaves from a trusted supplier within 6-12 months.
Grind the leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle for 5 minutes.
Mix 1 part of the powdered leaves with 2 parts of a suitable carrier agent such as silica or magnesium stearate.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the mixture using a capsule filling machine or a measuring spoon for 10 minutes.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container in a cool dry place for up to 2 years.

remedies.remedy_desc: Aloe barbadensis capsules helps with oily skin because they contain the potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties of aloe vera. The capsules help to soothe and calm the skin, reducing inflammation and irritation that can contribute to oily skin. Aloe vera also has natural sebum-regulating properties, which can help to balance the skin's natural oil production, reducing the appearance of oily skin and pores. This can lead to a smoother, more balanced complexion.
remedy_constituents: Aloin: Helps to reduce sebum production and prevent clogged pores, thereby controlling oily skin.
Chromones: Exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help to soothe and calm oily skin, reducing redness and irritation.
Glucomannans: Act as a natural absorbent, drawing out excess oil and impurities from the skin, thereby balancing its natural moisture levels.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Aloe vera gel from the leaves is used due to its soothing, anti-inflammatory, and moisturizing properties, which help balance the skin's natural oil production.
Gel from Leaves: The gel is used to help regulate sebum production, reduce acne, and prevent clogged pores, making it an effective remedy for oily skin.

Extract from Leaves: The extract from the leaves contains a combination of vitamins, minerals, and amino acids that work together to control oil production, reduce inflammation, and promote a healthy skin balance.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100-200 aloe barbadensis leaves from mature plants with thick green fleshy leaves and store them in a cool dry place.
Extract the gel from the aloe leaves using a juice extractor or blender and collect the clear liquid.
Strain the liquid through a fine mesh or cheesecloth to remove any remaining pulp or debris from the aloe extract.
Mix the strained aloe extract with a natural gelatin powder at a ratio of 1:4 (1 part aloe extract to 4 parts gelatin powder).
Fill gelatin capsules with the aloe gel mixture and seal them tightly to preserve the herbal remedy.

remedies.remedy_desc: Azadirachta indica capsules helps with oily skin because they contain the oil extracted from the Neem tree, which has anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. These properties help to reduce sebum production, thus controlling oiliness. Additionally, Neem oil has astringent properties that help to tighten pores, minimizing the appearance of oily skin. Regular use of Azadirachta indica capsules may also help to reduce acne, blackheads, and other skin issues associated with oily skin, promoting a healthier and more balanced complexion.
remedy_constituents: Limonoids: Help to regulate sebum production and reduce inflammation, thereby controlling oily skin.
Phenolic compounds: Exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe and calm oily skin, reducing the appearance of pores and acne.

Terpenes: Possess antibacterial and antifungal properties, helping to control the growth of bacteria that can lead to oily skin and acne, while also reducing inflammation and promoting a healthy skin balance.
remedy_parts: Seeds: They are used to make capsules for oily skin because they contain neem oil, which has antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties that help control oil production and reduce acne.
Leaves: They are used to make capsules for oily skin because they contain neem compounds that help regulate oil glands, reduce inflammation, and prevent bacterial growth.
Seeds: Some studies suggest they can also be used to reduce sebum production and prevent clogged pores.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 20-30 grams of dried azadirachta indica leaves and flowers from a trusted supplier or your own garden.
Dry the harvested material in a low-temperature oven at 40°c for 2 hours to ensure minimal degradation.
Grind 10 grams of the dried azadirachta indica leaves and flowers into a fine powder using a coffee grinder.
Mix the ground powder with 10-15 grams of gelatin or vegetarian capsule filler and 1 teaspoon of glycerin in a bowl.
Fill a capsule machine with the powder mixture and compress into 100-200 capsules using 8-10 minutes per batch.

remedies.remedy_desc: Ginkgo biloba capsules helps with oily skin because of its ability to improve circulation and reduce inflammation. By increasing blood flow to the skin, it helps to flush out toxins and excess sebum, resulting in a smoother and more balanced complexion. Additionally, ginkgo biloba has antioxidant properties that help to protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals, promoting a healthier and more even-toned appearance. This leads to a reduction in oil production and a decrease in acne and other skin issues associated with oily skin.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: Help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the skin, contributing to a decrease in oil production and sebum secretion.
Terpenoids: Have antioxidant properties that help regulate oil gland activity and prevent excessive oil secretion, resulting in a balanced skin pH.
Bilobalide: Acts as a free radical scavenger, reducing oxidative stress and inflammation that can cause oil glands to overproduce sebum, leading to oily skin.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Leaves are the most commonly used part due to their rich content of flavonoids and terpenoids, which help to regulate sebum production and reduce inflammation.
Seeds: Seeds are used for their antioxidant properties, which help to balance skin pH and reduce oiliness.
Leaves: (second instance, as this is a tie) Leaves are also used for their anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce redness and irritation associated with oily skin.
remedy_recipe: Weigh 500 grams of ginkgo biloba leaves and 200 grams of vegetable capsules.
Grind the ginkgo biloba leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder for 5 minutes.
Mix the ground ginkgo biloba powder with 20 grams of starch powder and 10 grams of silicon dioxide.
Fill the vegetable capsules with the mixture using a capsule filling machine at 100 capsules per hour.
Seal the filled capsules using a capsule sealer and store them in a cool dry place for 6 months.

remedies.remedy_desc: Zingiber officinale capsules helps with oily skin because they contain ginger, a natural anti-inflammatory agent that reduces sebum production and inflammation. The antiseptic properties of ginger help to kill bacteria that can clog pores and cause acne. Additionally, ginger has been shown to improve skin elasticity and reduce the appearance of pores, resulting in a smoother and more balanced complexion. By regulating sebum production and reducing inflammation, ginger capsules can help to control oily skin and promote a healthier skin appearance.
remedy_constituents: Gingerols: Gingerols, a type of sesquiterpene, have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce redness and inflammation associated with oily skin, leading to a more balanced skin tone.

Zingerone: Zingerone, a sesquiterpene, exhibits antioxidant properties that help protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals, thereby reducing the appearance of oily skin and promoting healthy skin regeneration.

Curcuminoids: Curcuminoids, a type of polyphenol, have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help regulate sebum production, reduce inflammation, and protect the skin from oxidative stress, all of which contribute to reducing oily skin.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Zingiber officinale's rhyzomes are commonly used in skin care capsules due to their high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties that help soothe and calm oily skin.
Roots: The roots of Zingiber officinale are also used in skin care capsules, as they contain compounds that help to balance and regulate the skin's natural oils, reducing the appearance of oily skin.

Leaves: The leaves of Zingiber officinale are used in skin care capsules because they contain antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties that help to purify and calm the skin, reducing oil production and inflammation associated with oily skin.
remedy_recipe: Grind 2 tablespoons of dried zingiber officinale root into a fine powder using a spice grinder for 2 minutes.
Mix the ground root powder with 1 tablespoon of gelatin powder in a small bowl.
Add 2 tablespoons of distilled water to the gelatin mixture and stir well to dissolve for 10 minutes.
Fill empty vegetarian capsules with 500 milligrams of the gelatin mixture using a capsule filler for 5 minutes.
Label and store the filled capsules in an airtight container in a cool dark place for up to 6 months.

remedies.remedy_desc: Eucalyptus globulus capsules helps with oily skin because they contain eucalyptus oil, a natural astringent that reduces sebum production and minimizes pores. The capsules also promote healthy skin by improving circulation and reducing inflammation. As a result, the skin appears clearer and more balanced, reducing the appearance of oiliness. Additionally, eucalyptus oil has antimicrobial properties that prevent bacterial growth, further contributing to healthy and balanced skin. This natural remedy can be an effective solution for those struggling with oily skin.
remedy_constituents: Cineole (Eucalyptol): Helps reduce sebum production and inflammation in the skin, thus controlling oily skin.
Limonene: Exhibits astringent and antiseptic properties, which can help to control excessive oil secretion and reduce acne.
Caffeic acid: Displays antioxidant properties that can help reduce inflammation and prevent damage caused by free radicals, thus promoting a balanced skin pH and reducing oily skin.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Used for their decongestant and antiseptic properties to help reduce oil production and inflammation in oily skin.
Barks: Utilized for their astringent and antimicrobial properties to help control sebum production and prevent acne.
Stems: Employed for their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties to help soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and inflammation associated with oily skin.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 500g of eucalyptus globulus leaves when they are dry and free of contamination.
Dry the harvested leaves in a warm air circulation oven at 50°c for 2 hours.
Grind 200g of dried leaves into a fine powder using a grinder.
Mix the powder with 100g of gelatin capsules and 20g of stearic acid in a bowl.
Fill 500 gelatin capsules with the powder mixture and seal them immediately.
